{{Quote|Need a little infiltration sabotage, with a dash of target spotting.|Zahn|<ref name="TOR" />}}
'''Zahn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] specialist of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]]. In [[3643 BBY]] he was stationed at [[Mos Anek]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] where he asked an Imperial ally to mark locations of several hostile targets for further precise demolition.<ref name="TOR" />
